chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Dislike of Sitting with Judges in Their Gatherings

text:
3226 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ :
"إِنَّ اَلنَّوَاوِيسَ شَكَتْ إِلَى اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ شِدَّةَ حَرِّهَا فَقَالَ لَهَا عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ "أُسْكُتِي فَإِنَّ مَوَاضِعَ اَلْقُضَاةِ أَشَدُّ حَرّاً مِنْكِ" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3226 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Indeed, the graves complained to Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, about their intense heat. So Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, said to them: 'Be silent, for the places of judges are hotter than you.'"
